inputs.label: Enclosure Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Länge des Reptiliengeheges in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de l'enclos du reptile en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud del recinto del reptil en centímetros.

inputs.label: Enclosure Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Breite des Reptiliengeheges in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de l'enclos du reptile en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: El ancho del recinto del reptil en centímetros.

inputs.label: Enclosure Height
inputs.businessContext: The height of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The height of the reptile enclosure in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Höhe des Reptiliengeheges in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de l'enclos du reptile en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: La altura del recinto del reptil en centímetros.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The room temperature outside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: The room temperature outside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.de: Raumtemperatur außerhalb des Geheges in Grad Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura ambiente fuera del recinto en grados Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة الغرفة خارج العلبة بالدرجات المئوية.

inputs.label: Desired Basking Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The target temperature for the basking spot inside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target temperature for the basking spot inside the enclosure in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muhafaza içindeki güneşlenme noktası için hedef sıcaklık (°C).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Zieltemperatur für den Sonnenplatz im Gehege in Grad Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température cible pour le point de repos à l'intérieur de l'enclos en degrés Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura objetivo para el punto de asoleamiento dentro del recinto en grados Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة المستهدفة لمنطقة التشمس داخل العلبة بالدرجات المئوية.

inputs.label: Insulation Factor (U-value)
inputs.businessContext: Thermal transmittance (U-value) of enclosure material. Typical glass: 5-6, insulated: 1-2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thermal transmittance (U-value) of enclosure material. Typical glass: 5-6, insulated: 1-2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Muhafaza malzemesinin ısıl geçirgenliği (U-değeri). Tipik cam: 5-6, yalıtımlı: 1-2.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wärmedurchgangskoeffizient (U-Wert) des Gehäusematerials. Typisch Glas: 5-6, isoliert: 1-2.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Transmittance thermique (valeur U) du matériau de l'enclos. Verre typique : 5-6, isolé : 1-2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Transmitancia térmica (valor U) del material del recinto. Vidrio típico: 5-6, aislado: 1-2.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النفاذية الحرارية (قيمة U) لمادة العلبة. الزجاج النموذجي: 5-6، المعزول: 1-2.

formulas.requiredWattage: insulationFactor * ((2 * (enclosureLength * enclosureWidth + enclosureLength * enclosureHeight + enclosureWidth * enclosureHeight)) / 10000) * (desiredTemp - ambientTemp)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
